mapper.insert: INSERT INTO booking (booking_number, date, booking_to, customer_name, origin, destination, booking_status, booking_class) VALUES (#{bookingNumber}, #{date}, #{bookingTo}, #{customer.name}, #{from}, #{to}, #{bookingStatus}, #{bookingClass})
mapper.select: SELECT booking_number, date, booking_to, customer_name, origin, destination, booking_status, booking_class FROM booking
